decks.notes: The deck focuses on using Mishra's Workshop and Ancient Tomb to quickly ramp into powerful artifacts like Golos, Tireless Pilgrim and Scrawling Crawler. It also utilizes disruptive cards like Wasteland, Thorn of Amethyst, and Sphere of Resistance to slow down opponents while Null Rod shuts down their artifacts. Crucible of Worlds and Strip Mine provide land destruction, while Urza's Saga and Inventors' Fair help search for key artifacts. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a mix of aggressive creatures, resource denial, and powerful artifacts.

The main focus of this Aggro - MUD deck is to quickly ramp up mana production and aggressively play powerful artifacts to overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes powerful artifacts like Black Lotus, Grim Monolith, and Mishra's Workshop to accelerate mana production. Utilizing cards like Trinisphere and Glaring Fleshraker, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with creatures like Scrawling Crawler and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain. Additionally, cards like Sensei's Divining Top and Mystic Forge provide card advantage and selection to ensure a streamlined game plan.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources and disrupting their game plan through counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures like Lavinia, Azorius Renegade. It also utilizes powerful draw spells like Ancestral Recall, Dig Through Time, and Treasure Cruise to maintain card advantage. The inclusion of cards like Strip Mine and Wasteland helps in disrupting the opponent's mana base, while cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Psychic Frog provide additional graveyard hate and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent in a one-on-one setting.

The deck focuses on utilizing Paradoxical Outcome along with various fast mana sources and card draw spells to generate a large amount of mana and card advantage. By effectively "bouncing" key artifacts like Moxen and Lotus to replay them again and again, the deck aims to set up a game-winning combo involving cards like Brain Freeze or Stock Up to mill or draw through the opponent's deck. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Force of Will and Force of Negation to protect its combo and can utilize Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion for additional value.

This deck focuses on assembling the pieces needed to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing the player to cast powerful spells like Ancestral Recall and Tinker. The deck also utilizes cards like Paradoxical Outcome and Coveted Jewel to draw cards and generate even more mana. With access to powerful artifacts like Black Lotus and Mishra's Workshop, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with card advantage and powerful threats, ultimately winning the game through a combination of mana ramping and card advantage.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of countering spells, removal, and card advantage. It utilizes powerful cards like Ancestral Recall, Force of Will, and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using cards like Lavinia, Azorius Renegade and Orcish Bowmasters, it aims to lock down the opponent's resources and limit their options. The deck also has access to powerful card filtering effects like Brainstorm and Dig Through Time to consistently find the right answers. Overall, the deck seeks to outlast the opponent and grind out a victory through superior card advantage and disruption.

This deck focuses on utilizing powerful control cards such as Force of Will and Mana Drain to disrupt the opponent's game plan. It aims to generate card advantage and mana advantage to outvalue the opponent and maintain control of the game. The deck also includes powerful draw spells and tutors like Gifts Ungiven and Demonic Tutor to find key combo pieces or answers when needed. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion adds an additional level of value and resilience to the deck's strategy. Ultimately, the deck aims to control the game until it can assemble a game-winning combination of cards.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and spells to generate mana and draw cards, enabling the player to cast multiple spells in a single turn. The key strategy is to set up a board state where Paradoxical Outcome can be used to return multiple artifacts to hand, generate more mana and draw more cards, allowing for a powerful combo to be executed. The deck also includes disruptive elements like counterspells to protect the combo and interact with the opponent's strategy, while also including Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion for additional recursion and value.

This deck revolves around using Coveted Jewel as a key piece to generate mana and draw cards, while also utilizing artifacts such as Mishra's Workshop and Karn, the Great Creator to accelerate and tutor for combo pieces. It also includes powerful spells like Ancestral Recall and Time Walk to gain card advantage and take extra turns. The goal is to quickly assemble the necessary pieces to lock down the opponent and win the game through a powerful combo, utilizing multiple mana sources and card draw to stay ahead.

This deck focuses on utilizing graveyard recursion and dredge mechanics to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Golgari Grave-Troll and Stinkweed Imp, as well as cards like Noxious Revival and Force of Will for disruption, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with fast creatures like Ichorid and Prized Amalgam. Through careful graveyard manipulation and strategic plays, the deck can quickly assemble a lethal board state and win the game through a powerful combo.

The deck focuses on generating mana quickly and efficiently, while utilizing cards like Paradoxical Outcome to draw cards and recast powerful artifacts. It also includes control elements like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to protect the combo and disrupt opponents. Lurrus of the Dream-Den provides additional value by allowing the player to recur low-cost permanents from their graveyard. Overall, the key idea is to ramp up quickly, draw cards, protect the combo, and efficiently win the game through a powerful synergy of artifacts and spells.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures while utilizing powerful card draw and tutoring effects to maintain card advantage. It aims to disrupt opponents' strategies and protect its own win conditions, making it difficult for the opponent to execute their game plan effectively. By efficiently managing resources and playing strategically, the deck can outvalue and outmaneuver opponents to secure victory.

The deck focuses on using powerful control elements, such as counterspells and removal, to disrupt the opponent's game plan. It also utilizes cards like Gifts Ungiven to search for key combo pieces or answers to the opponent's threats. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Underworld Breach and Brain Freeze to potentially win the game through a combo finish. The goal is to efficiently control the game's tempo, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and ultimately secure victory through a well-timed win condition.

This deck focuses on fast mana acceleration and powerful artifacts to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Workshop, Grim Monolith, and The One Ring, the deck can generate a significant amount of mana early in the game to cast powerful cards like Tezzeret, Karn, and Glaring Fleshraker. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while utilizing cards like Manifold Key and Scrawling Crawler to provide additional versatility and utility in various situations.

This deck focuses on generating massive amounts of mana quickly in order to play powerful artifacts and creatures that can close out the game swiftly. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Workshop, Grim Monolith, and various Moxen, the deck aims to establish an aggressive board presence and overwhelm opponents with threats like The One Ring and Glaring Fleshraker. The inclusion of key utility cards like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Mystic Forge further solidify the deck's ability to stay ahead in the game and secure a victory.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using artifacts like Mishra's Workshop, Mana Crypt, and Sol Ring, in order to play powerful threats and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also utilizes cards like Trinisphere and Chalice of the Void to slow down the opponent, while Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Karn, the Great Creator provide additional utility and synergy with artifacts. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruptive elements, ultimately leading to victory through aggressive plays and resource denial.
